lines: Asa closes the private water list before speaking.

choices.label: Ask why these households stay hidden
Show Asa the names found under lime
Admit that you forced the hidden door

lines: "The Compact would study some of them, while the Chain still owns paper on others. The rest need no reason beyond wanting a door that stays theirs."
"You can learn who lives here by asking each person. You cannot take this list as permission."
Asa looks once toward the concealed door and once toward the nearest child.
"Then do not ask me to call trespass trust. Finish the water work and leave the route out of your report."
Asa reads only the first name on each exposed household line, then covers the addresses with one hand.
"The roll can defend our cups. The same page can deliver us to a clinic archive or a debt collector."

questUpdate.log: The original roll may prove the household count, but Hidden Rows names remain private.

choices.label: Enter the names on the public water roll

questUpdate.log: Hidden Rows households enter the public water roll with their addresses exposed.

choices.label: Give the hidden-name copy to Compact clinicians

questUpdate.log: A Compact copy receives the Hidden Rows names and exposure histories.

choices.label: Give the hidden-name copy to Morrow auditors

questUpdate.log: A Morrow audit copy receives the Hidden Rows names and debt history.

choices.label: Fold the roll closed for now

lines: Asa copies the decision without copying another name.
"That is the consent you have. Carry no larger one."
